text.title: growth-content-marketing Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-content-marketing as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Publishing without a distribution plan — "if you build it they will come" approach.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Content discovery does not happen organically in competitive niches; active distribution is required for the first 12 months.

failure-mode.description: Giving up before 12 months of consistent publishing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SEO compounds over 6-12 months; early months produce minimal traffic regardless of content quality. Quitting before compounding begins wastes all prior investment.

failure-mode.description: Quantity over quality — publishing 5+ thin posts per week.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Low-quality content hurts domain authority and brand credibility; fewer better posts outperform in rankings and conversion.

failure-mode.description: Ignoring internal linking between related posts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Internal links distribute page authority and signal topical clusters to search engines; absence reduces ranking potential of all posts.
